methods.void addOrphanComment(Comment comment): Adds a comment that is not associated with any specific node.
methods.Node clone(): Creates a copy of this node.
methods.boolean containsData(DataKey key): does this node have data for this key?
methods.void customInitialization(): Called in every constructor for node specific code.
methods.boolean equals(Object obj): Checks if this node is equal to another object.
methods.Optional findCompilationUnit(): Finds the compilation unit this node belongs to.
methods.Node findRootNode(): Finds the root node of this AST by finding the topmost parent.
methods.List getAllContainedComments(): This is the list of Comment which are contained in the Node either because they are properly associated to one of its children or because they are floating around inside the Node
methods.List getChildNodes(): Contains all nodes that have this node set as their parent.
methods.List getChildNodesByType(Class clazz): Recursively finds all nodes of a certain type.
methods.Optional getComment(): This is a comment associated with this node.
methods.M getData(DataKey key): Gets data for this node using the given key.
methods.NodeMetaModel getMetaModel(): get JavaParser specific node introspection information.
methods.List getOrphanComments(): This is a list of Comment which are inside the node and are not associated with any meaningful AST Node.
methods.Optional getParentNode(): Return the parent node or null, if no parent is set.
methods.Node.Parsedness getParsed(): whether this node was successfully parsed or not. If it was not, only the range and tokenRange fields will be valid.
methods.Optional getRange(): the range of characters in the source code that this node covers.
methods.SymbolResolver getSymbolResolver(): Get the symbol resolver for this node.
methods.Optional getTokenRange(): the range of tokens in the source code that this node covers.
methods.int hashCode(): Get the hash code for this node.
methods.boolean isRegistered(AstObserver observe: Was this observer registered? Note that equals is used to determine if the given observer was registered.
methods.void notifyPropertyChange(ObservableProp: notify registered observers when a property of an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) node changes.
methods.void register(AstObserver observer, Node: Register a new observer for the given node.
methods.void registerForSubtree(AstObserver obse: Register the observer for the current node and all the contained node and nodelists, recursively.
methods.boolean remove(): Try to remove this node from the parent
methods.boolean remove(Node node): Try to remove a node from the parent
methods.Node removeComment(): Try to remove a comment from the parent
methods.void removeForced(): Forcibly removes this node from the AST.
methods.boolean removeOrphanComment(Comment comm: Try to remove an orphan comment from the parent.
methods.boolean replace(Node node): Try to replace this node in the parent with the supplied node.
methods.boolean replace(Node node, Node replacem: Try to replace this node in the parent with the supplied replacement node.
methods.void setAsParentNodeOf(Node childNode): Sets this node as the parent of the given child node.
methods.void setAsParentNodeOf(NodeList list): Sets this node as the parent of the given node list.
methods.Node setBlockComment(String comment): Use this to store additional information to this node.
methods.Node setComment(Comment comment): Use this to store additional information to this node.
methods.void setData(DataKey key, M object): Sets data for this node using the given key.
methods.Node setLineComment(String comment): Use this to store additional information to this node.
methods.Node setParentNode(Node newParentNode): Assign a new parent to this node, removing it from the list of children of the previous parent, if any.
methods.Node setParsed(Node.Parsedness parsed): Used by the parser to flag unparsable nodes.
methods.Node setRange(Range range): Set the range of this node.
methods.Node setTokenRange(TokenRange tokenRange: Set the token range of this node.
methods.String toString(): Return the String representation of this node.
methods.String toString(PrettyPrinterConfigurati: Return the String representation of this node using the given pretty printer configuration.
methods.void tryAddImportToParentCompilationUnit: Try to add an import to the parent compilation unit for the given class.
